prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: The only photo of E-204 Boxes, fittings & fill is blocked by packaging and glare. The visible outline suggests the right area, but the identifying mark and connection details cannot be read from the provided evidence. Source anchors for review: NEC 314.16, 300.14, 314.28 (pull box sizing).
title: T1 E-204 Insufficient evidence Identification
